claims.name: Steering P chosen given coherent at |c| 0.05 benign
claims.statement: At steering layer 25 with |c| = 0.05 of the mean activation norm, contrastive steering along the default-persona probe direction makes Gemma-3-27B pick the positively-steered task at P(chosen | coherent) = 1.0 on benign-benign pairs.
claims.derivation: Filter parsed rows to layer==25 and task_completed in {a,b}; average P(task_completed=='a') within each (signed_multiplier, pair_id, ordering), then across orderings to a per-pair P, then across pairs; select the signed_multiplier==+0.05 bucket; round to 3dp.

claims.name: Steering P chosen given coherent at |c| 0.05 harmful-benign
claims.statement: On harmful-benign pairs at layer 25 with |c| = 0.05, contrastive steering makes Gemma pick the positively-steered task at P(chosen | coherent) = 0.972.
claims.derivation: From checkpoint.parsed.jsonl filter condition=='probe_L25', layer==25, pair_type=='harmful_benign' (via pairs_200.json); per-pair aggregation identical to the benign claim; select signed_multiplier==+0.05; round to 3dp.

claims.name: Steering P chosen given coherent at |c| 0.05 harmful-harmful
claims.statement: On harmful-harmful pairs at layer 25 with |c| = 0.05, contrastive steering makes Gemma pick the positively-steered task at P(chosen | coherent) = 0.975.
claims.derivation: From checkpoint.parsed.jsonl filter condition=='probe_L25', layer==25, pair_type=='harmful_harmful' (via pairs_200.json); per-pair aggregation identical to the benign claim; select signed_multiplier==+0.05; round to 3dp.

claims.name: Steering P chosen given coherent minimum across pair types
claims.statement: The minimum of P(chosen | coherent) across benign-benign, harmful-benign, and harmful-harmful pair types at layer 25 and |c| = 0.05 is 0.972 (lower bound for the repeated 'P >= 0.96' claim in the paper).
claims.derivation: min() of the three pre-rounded per-pair-type P(chosen|coherent) values at |c|=0.05.
